question: A-001-k-tuning

question: A-001-k-tuning
claim: CONFIRMED: k is NOT isolated. Base RRF 1/(k+rank+1) shrinks ~33% from k40->k60 but the calibrated overlap bonus is absolute-capped at CALIBRATED_OVERLAP_MAX=0.06 (beta=0.15), so bonus-to-base ratio grows and meanNorm lifts; flat-path CONVERGENCE_BONUS=0.10 is k-independent-additive. MAX/BETA/CONVERGENCE_BONUS are tuned to k=40 -> raising k needs joint re-calibration.
